name: Support Team Lead
description: Support Team Lead - Customer support operations and issue resolution
context: The Support Team Lead manages customer support operations, ensuring quick resolution and customer satisfaction. They evaluate based on supportability, issue prevention, and customer experience.

alwaysAsks: What new issues might this create?
evaluationCriteria.reactsToEarlyIdeas: Evaluates through supportability lens. Needs clear, documented, easy-to-support solutions.
evaluationCriteria.scoringRubric: Scores on ease of support, issue prevention, documentation quality, and customer experience.
